executeBackUnbacked(DataTypes.ReserveDat.details: It is not possible to back more than the existing unbacked amount of the reserveEmits the `BackUnbacked` event

params.asset: The address of the underlying asset to repay
params.protocolFeeBps: The fraction of fees in basis points paid to the protocol
params.reserve: The reserve to back unbacked for

executeMintUnbacked(mapping(address => D.details: Essentially a supply without transferring the underlying.Emits the `MintUnbacked` eventEmits the `ReserveUsedAsCollateralEnabled` if asset is set as collateral

params.asset: The address of the underlying asset to mint hTokens of
params.onBehalfOf: The address that will receive the hTokens
params.referralCode: Code used to register the integrator originating the operation, for potential rewards.   0 if the action is executed directly by the user, without any middle-man
params.reservesData: The state of all the reserves
params.reservesList: The addresses of all the active reserves
params.userConfig: The user configuration mapping that tracks the supplied/borrowed assets

executeBackUnbacked(DataTypes.ReserveDat.notice: Back the current unbacked with `amount` and pay `fee`.

executeMintUnbacked(mapping(address => D.notice: Mint unbacked hTokens to a user and updates the unbacked for the reserve.
